PRODUCT.SATISFACTION_GUARANTEED: Satisfaction guaranteed - free return or money back guaranteed
PRODUCT.TAXES_TITLE: Taxes on SnusCo Orders in Austria
PRODUCT.TAXES_DESCRIPTION: At SnusCo, we are committed to complying with Austrian tax laws. For all online orders, applicable taxes, including nicotine taxes and VAT (sales tax), are calculated and included in the order total during checkout. Shipping charges may also be subject to VAT in Austria, depending on the region and applicable laws.
PRODUCT.TAXES_CALCULATION_TITLE: How is the Tax on Nicotine Products Calculated?
PRODUCT.TAXES_CALCULATION_DESCRIPTION: Nicotine Excise Tax (TNET), often referred to as 'nicotine tax,' is applied in accordance with Austrian federal regulations. The method of calculation depends on the type of product (Tobacco or Tobacco-Free) and the category it falls into. Taxes are calculated in one of the following ways:
PRODUCT.TAXES_CALCULATION_METHOD_1: Based on a percentage of the wholesale price: Calculated as a percentage of the product's cost to SnusCo.
PRODUCT.TAXES_CALCULATION_METHOD_2: Based on SnusCo’s selling price to the customer: Calculated as a percentage of the retail price.
PRODUCT.TAXES_CALCULATION_METHOD_3: Based on weight: Calculated per gram or per unit of the product.
PRODUCT.VAT_CALCULATION_TITLE: How Does SnusCo Calculate VAT on Orders?
PRODUCT.VAT_CALCULATION_DESCRIPTION: VAT is calculated in accordance with Austrian tax regulations and is applied to both the product price and, in most cases, the shipping cost. The current Austrian VAT rate for nicotine products is 20%. This ensures full compliance with local tax requirements.
